title: anthemis cretica subsp. columnae
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. columnae, also known as Crete chamomile or Anthemis cretica, is a subspecies of daisy-like flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Crete. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. columnae include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or ointment, and is also used in skincare products due to its soothing and calming effects on the skin.
